description_long: This is a medium-sized, squat pumpkin with a distinctive two-tiered shape, featuring a bulbous, orange upper section and a paler, beige lower section. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible natural blemishes, subtle ridges, and some areas of discoloration. The pumpkin has a short, thick, and dry stem protruding from the top center, which is light tan in color and textured. The upper section is broader and flatter, while the lower section is more rounded and tapers inward, giving the pumpkin a turban-like appearance. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on its surface. The overall look is natural and unaltered, suggesting it is freshly harvested and suitable for display or culinary use in an urban environment.
description: A squat, two-tiered pumpkin with a matte, orange upper section and a pale, rounded lower section, topped by a short, dry stem. The surface is rough and natural, with no carvings or decorations.
description_view_0: The pumpkin's broad, orange upper section and pale lower section are clearly visible, with the stem centered and some surface blemishes on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the stem and the smooth transition between the orange top and beige bottom, with fewer visible blemishes.
description_view_2: The right side of the pumpkin is shown, emphasizing the rounded lower section and a patch of discoloration on the upper surface.
description_view_3: The front of the pumpkin is visible, showing the full width of the orange upper section and the pale, bulbous lower section with subtle surface texture.
